description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a global before_script that logs in to the Docker registry using $DOCKER_REGISTRY_USER and $DOCKER_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define a build job that runs in the default build stage, is limited to the master branch (only: master), and executes docker build -t nickbusey/inventario:dev . followed by docker push nickbusey/inventario:dev. Define a release job that runs in the default test stage, is triggered only for tags matching the pattern ^v.*$ (except branches), and runs docker build -t nickbusey/inventario:latest ., docker push nickbusey/inventario:latest, docker tag nickbusey/inventario:latest nickbusey/inventario:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, and docker push nickbusey/inventairo:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME.
